craft_guidance: DETECTION-ONLY. Confirm RCE preconditions; do NOT exploit. Operator runs the destructive step manually.
Per Rule 5/7: no DROP, no rm, no real exfil. Use server-internal reads (version, current_user, hostname) and OOB callbacks (Collaborator) to confirm reachability.

Each probe answers ONE question: is the vulnerable feature reachable / privilege available / parser version exposed. Save with vuln_type='potential_rce'; downgrade to confirmed only after human-supervised exploitation.
Use confidence_boost <= 60 — detection of precondition is HIGH but not CRITICAL until exploit step confirms.
When OOB needed: replace {{collaborator}} with real Burp Collaborator URL (Rule 9a). Never hardcode.

sqli_mysql_file_priv_present.description: WSTG-INPV-05 -- MySQL SQLi confirmed -- check FILE privilege + secure_file_priv path, both required for INTO OUTFILE webshell. Detection reads internal state, does not write.

probes.description: Reads OS + INTO OUTFILE path + current MySQL user -- empty secure_file_priv = OUTFILE anywhere on disk = webshell-capable. Non-empty path = restricted but still writable
LOAD_FILE() of /etc/hostname -- if returns hostname string, FILE privilege present and secure_file_priv allows read. Same privilege enables INTO OUTFILE for webshell write

sqli_pg_superuser_or_copy_priv.description: PostgreSQL SQLi confirmed -- check for superuser (enables COPY TO PROGRAM = direct OS exec) or pg_read_server_files membership

probes.payload: {{baseline}} UNION SELECT current_setting('server_version'),current_user,(SELECT rolsuper::text FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname=current_user),null-- -
probes.description: Reads server version + user + superuser flag -- rolsuper=true means COPY TO PROGRAM available (full RCE). Even non-super may have pg_execute_server_program role (PG 11+)

sqli_mssql_xpcmdshell_state.description: MSSQL SQLi confirmed -- check sysadmin + xp_cmdshell enabled state. Both true = direct RCE. Sysadmin alone = can re-enable xp_cmdshell.

probes.payload: {{baseline}} UNION SELECT @@version,SUSER_SNAME(),IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin'),(SELECT CAST(value_in_use AS varchar) FROM sys.configurations WHERE name='xp_cmdshell')-- -
probes.description: Returns version + login + sysadmin flag + xp_cmdshell value_in_use (1=enabled, 0=disabled). sysadmin=1 always permits sp_configure to flip xp_cmdshell on.

sqli_oracle_dbms_scheduler_priv.description: Oracle SQLi confirmed -- check EXECUTE on DBMS_SCHEDULER (CREATE JOB then run) or DBMS_XMLQUERY (Java VM call). Either = RCE without DBA.

probes.payload: {{baseline}} UNION SELECT banner,user,(SELECT count(*) FROM user_tab_privs WHERE table_name='DBMS_SCHEDULER'),null FROM v$version-- -
probes.description: Reads Oracle banner + current user + DBMS_SCHEDULER privilege count -- count>0 = scheduler RCE path available

sqli_sqlite_load_extension.description: SQLite SQLi confirmed -- check if load_extension() compiled in. If yes, attacker loads shared library = RCE. Detection probes the SQLite version + extension load capability.

probes.description: Returns SQLite version -- combined with framework detection, reveals whether load_extension is compiled (default in 3.13+ with SQLITE_ENABLE_LOAD_EXTENSION)

ssrf_redis_reachable.description: WSTG-INPV-19 -- SSRF + gopher/dict/redis protocol pivot -- send INFO command to internal Redis via SSRF. Read-only probe confirms Redis reachable + version; SET-based RCE (cron / SSH key) is operator step.

probes.description: Gopher to Redis INFO -- returns redis_version line in response. Read-only; pivots to SET-based RCE only with operator OK.
Dict-protocol Redis probe -- alternative to gopher

ssrf_memcached_reachable.description: SSRF reaches internal Memcached -- read 'stats' / 'version' to confirm. Cache-poison-to-RCE is operator step (requires app reading cache value into eval-style sink).

probes.description: Memcached stats -- returns STAT lines if reachable

ssrf_elasticsearch_dynamic_scripting.description: SSRF to internal Elasticsearch -- detect /_cluster + scripting status. dynamic scripting=true OR groovy/painless module = sandbox-escape RCE class.

probes.description: Reads cluster settings -- looks for script.allowed_types, script.painless.regex, dynamic scripting flags

ssrf_jolokia_runtime_mbean.description: SSRF to internal Jolokia agent (Spring Boot / JMX-over-HTTP) -- reads MBean catalog. Presence of java.lang:type=Runtime confirms exec primitive once /exec is wired.

probes.description: Lists JMX MBeans -- look for Runtime, OperatingSystem MBeans. Each exposes attributes; some installs allow /exec/<MBean>/<operation>.
Actuator-mounted Jolokia -- common on Spring Boot 1.x and misconfigured 2.x exposures

spring_actuator_env_mutable.description: Spring Boot Actuator /env endpoint exposed AND accepts POST -- attacker can mutate spring.cloud.bootstrap.location, eureka.client.serviceUrl, logging.config to fetch attacker JNDI/SpEL -> RCE. Read-only probe confirms POST capability without writing destructively.

probes.description: POST /actuator/env with benign key -- 200/201 with 'updated' or echo = mutable env. Operator escalates via spring.cloud.bootstrap.location or JNDI; do NOT escalate here.
GET /actuator/restart returns 405 (method not allowed) -- endpoint exists, POST will trigger restart. Combined with env mutation = RCE chain.

spring4shell_classloader_reachable.description: Spring4Shell CVE-2022-22965 -- WebDataBinder binds nested classLoader properties. Probe attempts read of class.module.classLoader.resources -- distinct response (different body, 400, or stack trace mentioning classLoader) indicates vulnerable binding.

probes.description: Sends Spring4Shell precondition probe -- if server logs 'classLoader' / 'WebappClassLoaderBase' / accepts binding, vulnerable filter is absent. Detection only; do NOT write tomcatwar.jsp.

spring_cloud_function_routing_expression.description: Spring Cloud Function CVE-2022-22963 -- header spring.cloud.function.routing-expression accepts SpEL. Benign math expression confirms eval without RCE.

probes.description: Set header 'spring.cloud.function.routing-expression: T(java.lang.System).currentTimeMillis()' -- if response timing reflects evaluation or differs from baseline numerically, SpEL is active

spring_cloud_gateway_spel.description: Spring Cloud Gateway CVE-2022-22947 -- /actuator/gateway/routes accepts route definitions with SpEL filters. Benign math probe confirms.

probes.description: Create route with SpEL #{1+1} in header arg -- subsequent route hit returns header X-Probe: 2 if SpEL evaluates. Operator deletes route after detection.

confluence_ognl_eval.description: Confluence OGNL CVE-2022-26134 / CVE-2023-22515 family -- URL-path-injected OGNL. Benign math reflection confirms eval.

probes.description: DETECTION: replace exec call with a NO-OP probe; the real probe is `${100+200}` reflected in response -- if body contains '300', OGNL eval confirmed.
Benign OGNL math -- if response contains '300' or path/route now uses computed value, eval active without firing exec

imagemagick_mvg_parser_active.description: ImageTragick lineage -- upload tiny MVG/MSL file with benign read directive. Server-side ImageMagick parses it -> response timing / error reveals parser engagement. Real exploit (msl: read) is operator step.

probes.payload:
push graphic-context
viewbox 0 0 1 1
image over 0,0 0,0 'label:swktest-{{marker}}'
pop graphic-context
probes.description: MVG with benign label directive -- if ImageMagick parses and renders, response references swktest-{{marker}} in metadata / filename / OCR. Confirms MVG parsing active without msl:/dev/random or system call.

libwebp_version_disclosure.description: CVE-2023-4863 -- libwebp <1.3.2 heap overflow in Huffman table. Probe checks if WebP processing is active and library version is exposed (via image metadata round-trip or error message).

probes.description: Upload smallest valid WebP -- response metadata / error mentions 'libwebp <ver>' or behaves distinct from JPEG/PNG. Combined with framework versioning, confirms vulnerable lib.

ghostscript_pdf_eval_active.description: Ghostscript CVE-2023-43654 / CVE-2024-0335 family -- server uses gs to process PDF / EPS / PS. Benign PDF with metadata revealing gs version confirms vector. Real -dSAFER bypass is operator step.

probes.description: Tiny PostScript with title -- if gs processes, downstream response references title or returns 200 quickly. Combine with response timing / mime-change.

exiftool_djvu_parser_active.description: ExifTool CVE-2021-22204 -- DjVu / ANT chunk parsing -> Perl `eval()`. Detection: upload .djvu with benign metadata; if server processes, vector confirmed.

probes.description: Minimal DjVu magic header + benign chunk -- if exiftool runs (returns metadata or timing delta), parser is active. Real eval payload is operator step.

jndi_jdbc_h2_console.description: H2 database console exposed -- /h2-console allows JDBC URL with INIT script (RUNSCRIPT FROM URL). Attacker JDBC URL with INIT = RCE. Detection confirms console reachability + auth bypass, NOT script execution.

probes.description: GET /h2-console -- 200 with H2 login form = console reachable. CVE-2021-42392 chain begins here.
H2 login endpoint -- presence confirms exposed console with JDBC URL injection surface

node_vm2_or_eval_sink_in_js.description: Server-side Node app uses vm / vm2 sandbox with user input. CVE-2023-37466 / CVE-2023-37903 vm2 sandbox escapes are detection candidates. Probe checks JS sink presence via reflection.

probes.description: Send literal math expression -- if response body contains '3', server eval'd input. Confirms eval/Function/vm sink without RCE payload.

json_parse_reviver_sink.description: JSON.parse with attacker-controlled reviver / merge into prototype -- precursor to Object.prototype RCE gadget. Detection re-uses prototype-pollution probe pattern but flags response side effect.

probes.description: Prototype pollution via JSON merge -- subsequent endpoint may behave distinct (CSP header changed, auth bypassed). Detection only; gadget chain to RCE is operator step.

ofbiz_groovy_eval.description: Apache OFBiz CVE-2023-49070 / CVE-2023-51467 -- /webtools/control/ViewMain accepts groovyProgram parameter. Benign math probe confirms eval.

probes.description: Groovy probe -- benign exception with 1+2 result. Stack trace containing '300' = Groovy eval active. Operator escalates to Runtime.exec only after authorization.

joomla_template_php_write_detection.description: Joomla admin -> template manager allows PHP write to template files. Detection: GET admin template editor route; no destructive POST.

probes.description: GET template editor URL -- 200 with editor UI = authenticated admin can write PHP. Detection of capability only.

drupal_phpmodule_or_php_filter_enabled.description: Drupal core lacks PHP filter in 8+; if enabled / 7.x with module = node body executes PHP. Detection: probe for php_filter module / PHP input format availability.

probes.description: Admin modules page (authenticated) -- presence of 'PHP filter' in body = PHP-as-content available = RCE via node edit (operator step)

wordpress_theme_editor_writable.description: WordPress wp-admin theme/plugin editor allows PHP write -- detection of editor reachability + DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT=false.

probes.description: GET theme editor -- 200 with file textarea = editing enabled. PHP write to active theme = RCE on next page render (operator step).
Plugin editor -- same vector via plugin files
